calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Rommye Mellissa Birnbaum was sworn and examined. The Court orders petitioner's name changed to Romika Raquel Weber. Decree signed.
